benefits.name: Collateral-free Enterprise Development Loan (two tranches)
benefits.summary: Collateral-free enterprise loan to registered artisans/craftspeople in 18 traditional trades, in two tranches at a concessional 5pct interest, with government interest subvention and a graded credit guarantee.
benefits.calculation_logic: Tranche 1 up to 1 lakh (18-month repayment); tranche 2 up to 2 lakh (30-month repayment) after repaying tranche 1 and completing advanced training or adopting digital transactions. Beneficiary pays 5pct; GoI provides 8pct interest subvention. CGTMSE graded portfolio guarantee.

benefits.name: Toolkit incentive (e-voucher)
benefits.summary: One-time toolkit incentive provided as an e-RUPI voucher to registered artisans at the start of basic training, to buy modern trade-specific tools. It is a grant, not a loan.
benefits.calculation_logic: Flat 15,000 e-voucher per beneficiary, after skill verification, at the start of basic training. Usable only to purchase tools (not withdrawable as cash).

benefits.name: Training stipend and digital-transaction incentive
benefits.summary: Cash support to registered artisans: a daily stipend during skill training and a small per-transaction incentive to encourage adoption of digital payments.
benefits.calculation_logic: Training stipend of 500 per day during basic (5-7 days) and advanced (15+ days) training. Digital-transaction incentive of 1 per eligible digital transaction, capped at 100 transactions per month.

metadata.notes: Registration via Common Service Centres with Aadhaar biometrics. Basic training required before tranche 1. Not for those who took PMEGP/PM SVANidhi/MUDRA in the last 5 years. Scheme runs FY2023-24 to FY2027-28.

suggested_faqs.question: What is the main objective of PM Vishwakarma Scheme?
suggested_faqs.answer: The main objective is to provide assistance and support under PM Vishwakarma Scheme to eligible beneficiaries.

suggested_faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for PM Vishwakarma Scheme?
suggested_faqs.answer: Businesses belonging to artisan, micro, women_led, sc_st_entrepreneur, obc_entrepreneur in handicrafts, manufacturing, services may apply.
